snippets.description: postWebhook: fixed client-safe CalDavWebhookError message; secret/URL/upstream body never attached to the thrown error; fail-closed on missing env.
snippets.content: const CLIENT_SAFE_MESSAGE = 'Calendar service unavailable'; ... if (!url || !secret) throw new CalDavWebhookError(CLIENT_SAFE_MESSAGE); ... catch { throw new CalDavWebhookError(CLIENT_SAFE_MESSAGE); } if (!res.ok) throw new CalDavWebhookError(CLIENT_SAFE_MESSAGE, res.status);

snippets.description: POST handler: session gate is FIRST statement; Zod validate before writer; CalDavWebhookError mapped to error(502) generic message.
snippets.content: if (!locals.user) throw error(401, 'Unauthorized'); ... catch (e) { if (e instanceof CalDavWebhookError) throw error(502, 'Calendar service unavailable'); throw e; }

snippets.description: PUT + DELETE handlers: session gate FIRST in both; PUT mirrors POST CRM-HREF embedding; writer throws mapped to error(502).
snippets.content: export const PUT = async ({ locals, request, params }) => { if (!locals.user) throw error(401, 'Unauthorized'); ... } export const DELETE = async ({ locals, params }) => { if (!locals.user) throw error(401, 'Unauthorized'); ... }

snippets.description: n8n env accessors read $env/dynamic/private (never process.env); server-only JSDoc; return undefined when unset (writer fails closed).
snippets.content: export function n8nWebhookSecret(): string | undefined { return env.N8N_WEBHOOK_SECRET; }
